query:
INSERT INTO historical_event (
                    application_number, drug_name, sponsor_name, application_type,
                    approval_date, decision_outcome, enrichment_status, source,
                    indication_area
                )
                VALUES (
                    $1, $2, 'S', 'NDA', '2024-01-01', 'approved', 'llm_enriched', 'openfda',
                    'oncology'
                )
